title: Mizra (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mizra''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Mizra system/Legends|Mizra system]]''', an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*The '''[[Battle of Mizra]]''', a battle of the [[New Sith Wars]]
*The '''[[Mizra Syndrome]]''', an affliction that could affect [[Human/Legends|Humans]]

{{Disambig}}
